pages.text: Natural Uranium contains only 0.7% U-235. To make reactor fuel, you need 3-5% enrichment. $(br2)A single $(l:unnamednuclear:centrifuge)Centrifuge$ only provides a small boost. You must link multiple centrifuges in a cascade, piping the 'product' to the next stage and the 'tails' back.
The Isotope Centrifuge separates U-235 from U-238 using centrifugal force.
